subject: Feb 1st, 2026
fact: The session date is recorded as Feb 1st, 2026.
source_quote: Date: Feb 1st, 2026

subject: Black Ember Outpost
fact: Black Ember Outpost is a massive fortress built of polished obsidian directly into the wall of a huge cavern.
source_quote: polished obsidian of Black Ember Outpost was built directly into the cave wall

subject: Great Hall
fact: The Great Hall is a titanic chamber nearly one hundred feet wide and long within the outpost.
source_quote: a titanic chamber nearly one hundred feet wide and long

subject: Fire Giant sergeant
fact: A Fire Giant sergeant was drilling a squad of ogres and hell hounds in the Great Hall.
source_quote: Fire Giant sergeant attempting to drill a squad of miserable ogres and bored hell hounds

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur used magical manipulation to strip the ogres of their ill-fitting uniforms.
source_quote: Felkur had used magical manipulation to strip the ogres of their ill-fitting uniforms

subject: Daein
fact: Daein created the illusion of a female hellhound to distract the male hellhounds.
source_quote: Daein created the illusion of a female hellhound to distract the males

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas delivered a devastating blow to the fire giant sergeant with her oath-sworn bow.
source_quote: Akritas delivered a devastating blow to the fire giant sergeant with her oath-sworn bow

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim waded into battle during the ambush.
source_quote: Bramgrim waded into battle

subject: Daein
fact: Daein mimicked the fire giant's voice with uncanny precision to maintain the element of surprise.
source_quote: Daein mimicked the fire giant's voice with uncanny precision

subject: Daein
fact: Daein's performance included the remark that the human prisoner was particularly beautiful.
source_quote: the performance included the giant remarking that the human prisoner was particularly beautiful

subject: human prisoner
fact: A human prisoner was present at the outpost and described as particularly beautiful by the illusion.
source_quote: the human prisoner was particularly beautiful

subject: ogres
fact: Two ogres were present in the Great Hall wearing ill-fitting uniforms.
source_quote: drilling two ogres and three hell hounds

subject: hell hounds
fact: Three hell hounds were present in the Great Hall and appeared bored.
source_quote: drilling two ogres and three hell hounds

subject: hell hounds
fact: One hellhound was killed by Akritas after being marked.
source_quote: Akritas kills Hell Hound 1

subject: hell hounds
fact: One hellhound escaped by running away.
source_quote: Hell Hound 3 runs to escape and succeeds

subject: oath-sworn bow
fact: Akritas used her oath-sworn bow to strike the fire giant.
source_quote: oath-sworn bow

subject: uniforms
fact: The ogres wore ill-fitting uniforms that were poorly made.
source_quote: ill-fitting uniforms that are poorly made

subject: kennel
fact: The party navigated past a kennel reeking of burned hair.
source_quote: kennel reeking of burned hair

subject: storeroom
fact: The party reached a storeroom where ogres hauled water from a well.
source_quote: storeroom where more ogres hauled water from a well

subject: well
fact: A well in the storeroom serves as the entrance to the Path of Shadows.
source_quote: Recognizing this well as the entrance to the Path of Shadows

subject: Path of Shadows
fact: The Path of Shadows is a route leading from the well to Maerimydra.
source_quote: Path of Shadows that leads to Maerimydra

subject: fire giant
fact: A fire giant was watching ogres haul water in the storeroom.
source_quote: watchful eye of another fire giant

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim silenced the area to prevent alarms before the fight in the storeroom.
source_quote: Bramgrim silenced the area to prevent any alarms

subject: fire giant
fact: The fire giant in the storeroom landed a bone-crushing blow on Daein.
source_quote: fire giant landing a bone-crushing blow on Daein

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim lost his concentration after being struck by an ogre.
source_quote: Bramgrim losing his concentration after being struck by an ogre

subject: Daein
fact: Daein killed an ogre and struck the fire giant twice while winking at the cleric.
source_quote: Daein responded with relentless fury, killing an ogre and striking the giant twice while winking at the cleric

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim abandoned his healing-only approach to unleash devastating magic after being shamed by Daein.
source_quote: shamed Bramgrim into abandoning his healing-only approach to unleash devastating magic

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas delivered the final blow to the fire giant in the storeroom.
source_quote: Akritas delivered the final blow to the fire giant

subject: Owlbear
fact: An Owlbear savagely finished off the remaining ogres in the first fight.
source_quote: Owlbear savagely finished off the remaining ogres

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear took fire breath damage from a hellhound.
source_quote: fire breath on the Owlbear and Bramgrim

subject: cannon
fact: Felkur used a cannon modified with a cold infusion to target the giant.
source_quote: Felkur had modified his cannon with a cold infusion

subject: cannon
fact: Felkur used his cannon to cause 17 points of ice damage on Hell Hound 1 and Hell Hound 2.
source_quote: Felkur uses his cannon to cause 17 points of ice damage on Hell Hound 1 and Hell Hound 2

subject: illusion of female hellhound
fact: Felkur cast an illusion of a female hellhound to distract the males.
source_quote: Felkur distracts the hell hounds with his illusion of a female hell hound

subject: removal of ogre uniforms
fact: Felkur successfully removed the uniform of one of the ogres with a natural 20 sleight of hand.
source_quote: Felkur rolls a natural 20 sleight of hand and the Ogres don't notice the disembodied magical hand

subject: removal of ogre uniforms
fact: Felkur rolled an 18 to remove the uniform of one of the ogres.
source_quote: Felkur then rolls an 18, and the uniform of one of the ogres falls off

subject: fireball
fact: Felkur used a fireball on the ogres from an arrow slit.
source_quote: Felkur from one of the arrow slits, uses a fireball on the ogres

subject: spirit guardians
fact: Bramgrim cast spirit guardians and walked into the combat.
source_quote: Bramgrim casts spirit guardians and walks into the combat

subject: critical hit by Akritas
fact: Akritas scored a critical hit on the Fire Giant doing over 50 points of damage.
source_quote: gets a critical doing over 50 points of damage

subject: Daein's first attack
fact: Daein missed his first attack against the giant.
source_quote: Daein misses with this first attack against the giant

subject: Daein's critical hit
fact: Daein responded with a critical hit doing 17 points of damage.
source_quote: Daein responds with a critical hit doing 17 points of damage

subject: Bramgrim's disappointment
fact: Bramgrim was disappointed that Daein didn't use an action surge.
source_quote: Bramgrim is disappointed that Daein doesn't use an action surge

subject: Bramgrim's concentration loss
fact: Bramgrim lost his concentration on spirit guardians when struck by a hellhound.
source_quote: Bramgrim loses his concentration, and Daein - tsk's tsk's him back

subject: spiritual weapon
fact: Bramgrim cast spiritual weapon and struck one of the Hell hounds.
source_quote: Bramgrim casts spiritual weapon and strikes one of the Hell hounds

subject: fire breath attack
fact: One Hell Hound used fire breath on the Owlbear and Bramgrim.
source_quote: One Hell Hounds use their fire breath on the Owlbear and Bramgrim

subject: ice damage from cannon
fact: Felkur's cannon caused 17 points of ice damage on Hell Hound 1 and Hell Hound 2.
source_quote: Felkur uses his cannon to cause 17 points of ice damage on Hell Hound 1 and Hell Hound 2

subject: escape of Hell Hound 3
fact: Hell Hound 3 ran to escape and succeeded.
source_quote: Hell Hound 3 runs to escape and succeeds

subject: silence spell
fact: Bramgrim cast silence to prevent anyone from hearing the upcoming fight in the storeroom.
source_quote: Bramgrim casts silence to prevent anyone from hearing what is about to happen

subject: critical hit on Daein
fact: The Fire Giant struck Daein with a critical doing 50 points of damage.
source_quote: The Fire Giant strikes Daein with a critical doing 50 points of damage

subject: psionic reduction
fact: Daein used his psionic ability to reduce the damage from 50 to 45.
source_quote: Daein uses his psionic ability to reduce it to from 50 to 45

subject: damage by Owlbear
fact: The owlbear did 38 points of damage on ogre 2.
source_quote: The owlbear does 38 points of damage on ogre 2

subject: 5th level spirit guardians
fact: Bramgrim cast a 5th level spirit guardian that dealt 19 points of damage to the Fire Giant and the Ogre.
source_quote: Bramgrim casts a 5th level spirit guardian and marches into combat. Both the Fire Giant and the Ogre miss their saving throws and take 19 points of damage

subject: hunter's mark
fact: Akritas cast hunter's mark on the Fire Giant.
source_quote: Akritas casts hunter's mark on the Fire Giant

subject: damage by Akritas
fact: Akritas struck the Fire Giant twice with her bow doing 28 points of damage.
source_quote: strikes twice with her bow doing 28 points of damage

subject: Daein's missed attacks
fact: Daein swung his sword and missed both times.
source_quote: Daein swings his sword and misses both times

subject: Daein's action surge
fact: Daein used an action surge and hit the Fire Giant twice.
source_quote: Daein uses an action surge, and hits the Fire Giant twice

subject: Mass Healing Word
fact: Bramgrim cast Mass Healing Word after being shamed by Daein.
source_quote: the cleric casts Mass Healing Word

subject: Toll the Dead
fact: Bramgrim cast Toll the Dead which chimes and dealt 27 points of necrotic damage to the Giant.
source_quote: The Toll chimes, and the Giant takes 27 points of necrotic damage

subject: crates and barrels
fact: Large crates and barrels line the floor and walls of the storeroom.
source_quote: Large crates and barrels line the floor and walls of this room

subject: black ale
fact: The storeroom contained sluggish black ale.
source_quote: sluggish black ale

subject: trap door
fact: An ogre was pulling water out of a five foot wide trap door.
source_quote: pulling water out of a five foot wide trap door

subject: Pathway of Shadows
fact: The well leads to the Pool of Water which is the Pathway of Shadows.
source_quote: pool of water that leads to the Pathway of Shadows

subject: Maerimydra
fact: The Pathway of Shadows leads to Maerimydra.
source_quote: Pathway of Shadows that leads to Maerimydra

subject: Ogre 1
fact: Ogre 1 was killed by Daein.
source_quote: Daein attacks twice killing the Ogre 1

subject: Ogre 2
fact: Ogre 2 was struck twice by Akritas and then killed by Felkur.
source_quote: Felkur kills ogre 2

subject: Fire Giants
fact: The Fire Giants were drilling ogres and hell hounds in the Great Hall.
source_quote: A Fire Giant sergeant attempting to drill his ogre troops

subject: human prisoner beauty
fact: The human prisoner was described as particularly beautiful in the auditory illusion.
source_quote: The human was particularly beautiful

subject: Bramgrim's healing philosophy
fact: Bramgrim initially claimed he could not attack because he is a cleric of life and healing is his calling.
source_quote: he's a cleric of life, and healing is his calling

subject: Felkur's desire for a pet hellhound
fact: Felkur asked if they could get one of the Hellhounds as pets.
source_quote: Felkur asks if they can get one of the Hellhounds as pets

subject: Daein's shame of Bramgrim
fact: Daein shamed Bramgrim into changing his combat approach.
source_quote: Daein shames Bramgrim
